parameters.text:
=You are a high-precision data extraction assistant. Extract the following information from the provided text/PDF and return it strictly as a single JSON object.

{{ $json.content }}

You are a high-precision data extraction assistant for BMI Advisory. Extract information from the provided text/PDF and return it strictly as a single JSON object.

### CO-APPLICANT EXTRACTION RULES:
1. Locate the "Co-Applicant Name" section [referencing image_7ce203.png].
2. You MUST extract the data for the following six fields in this specific section:
   - Co-Applicant Name
   - DOB (Date of Birth)
   - Gender
   - Phone
   - Email
   - Smoker (Yes/No)
3. Even if the text is small or handwritten, you must attempt to capture the Phone number and Email address.
4. If a field is empty, return "N/A". DO NOT skip the field.

### EXTRACTION RULES FOR OPT-IN-STATUS:
opt_in_status: STRICT RULE: Look at the "Insurance Options" section. If there is an "X", a checkmark, or any dark filling inside the box next to "Yes, I would like mortgage insurance advice...", you MUST return true. If the box is completely empty or "No thanks" is marked, return false. Do not ignore the [X] mark.


### EXTRACTION RULES FOR BROKER NAME:
1. White House/Legacy Forms: Look at the top row. The "Mortgage Broker:" field is located to the right of the Date. Example: "Pete & Sue Solymosi".
2. Xeva Forms: Look at the top row. The "Broker:" field is located next to the Date.
3. MMG Emails: Look for a line that starts with "Broker:" (often in the signature or a bulleted list). Example: "Heather Manna".
4. CONFUSION CHECK: Do NOT confuse the "Broker" with the "Agent". Agents are ONLY Jessey Camara, Rosy Jallad, or Rachel McCreath. If you see these names, they are Agents, not Brokers.

### JSON STRUCTURE:
{
  "form_source": "Identify as Xeva, White House, Legacy, MMG, or Unknown",
  "client_personal_info": {
    "client_name": "Applicant Name",
    "client_dob": "DOB",
    "client_gender": "Gender",
    "client_phone": "Phone",
    "client_email": "Email",
    "smoker_status": "Yes/No"
  },
  "financial_data": {
    "mortgage_amount": "Numeric value only",
    "amortization_years": "Numeric value only",
    "monthly_payment": "Numeric value only"
  },
  "co_applicant_info": {
    "name": "N/A if missing",
    "dob": "N/A if missing",
    "gender": "N/A if missing"
    "phone":
    "email":
  },
  "compliance_routing": {
    "opt_in_status": "Boolean: true if 'Yes' is checked, false if 'No' or empty",
    "broker_name": "Extract based on the EXTRACTION RULES above",
    "agent_name": "Leave as N/A - will be assigned by n8n",
    "province_license": "Identify province from the address or text if available"
  },
  "confidence_score": "Value 0 to 1"
}

Formatting: If a field is missing, use "N/A". Return ONLY raw JSON.

parameters.subject: =ACTION REQUIRED: Low Confidence Lead - {{ $('Merge').item.json.output.client_name }}
parameters.message:
=

Hello Rachel,

The AI Agent has flagged a lead that requires manual review due to a low confidence score.

  • Client Name: {{ $json.output.client_name }}
  • AI Confidence Score: {{ $json.output.confidence_score }}
  • Office Source: {{ $json.output.form_source }}
  • Extracted Email: {{ $json.output.client_email }}

This lead has not been sent to the Vapi voice agent. Please check the PDF in Google Drive to verify the details.

Best regards,
Automation Engine

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "firstName": "{{ $('Cleaning the data').item.json.output.client_personal_info.client_name.split(' ')[0] }}",
  "lastName": "{{ $('Cleaning the data').item.json.output.client_personal_info.client_name.split(' ').slice(1).join(' ') }}",
  "email": "{{ $('Cleaning the data').item.json.output.client_personal_info.client_email }}",
  "phone": "{{ $('Cleaning the data').item.json.output.client_personal_info.client_phone }}",
  "gender": "{{ $('Cleaning the data').item.json.output.client_personal_info.client_gender }}",
  "dateOfBirth": "{{ $('Cleaning the data').item.json.output.client_personal_info.client_dob }}",
  "locationId": "pwLynUdxBeG99YnVeYR4",
  "customFields": [
    { "id": "6zCNBWN4S5TWRfykesw7", "value": "{{ $('Cleaning the data').item.json.output.financial_data.mortgage_amount }}" },
    { "id": "BFBaZ8jlMFNMEqUQywsp", "value": "{{ $('Cleaning the data').item.json.output.form_source }}" },
    { "id": "G550l3SUnJfLCnBBbNrD", "value": "{{ $('Cleaning the data').item.json.output.confidence_score }}" },
    { "id": "KRX9pJ1a1TmyDNgYVuHs", "value": "{{ $('Cleaning the data').item.json.output.co_applicant_info.email }}" },
    { "id": "TPzo964rs4KiRFpW88sW", "value": "{{ $('Cleaning the data').item.json.output.compliance_routing.opt_in_status }}" },
    { "id": "cI5gmYsbFRA2hdR1ZJwg", "value": "{{ $('Cleaning the data').item.json.output.client_personal_info.smoker_status }}" },
    { "id": "fRrZHnm6J6rZZE3Mxyng", "value": "{{ $('Cleaning the data').item.json.output.co_applicant_info?.smoker || "" }}" },
    { "id": "fd07p18IHGPiAwa7UaiM", "value": "{{ $('Cleaning the data').item.json.output.client_personal_info.client_dob === "N/A" ? "" : $('Cleaning the data').item.json.output.client_personal_info.client_dob }}" },
    { "id": "gM6nLXfN86z65MYWcvqY", "value": "{{ $('Cleaning the data').item.json.output.compliance_routing.broker_name }}" },
    { "id": "khw1hDpnGiFrFM6mxtKI", "value": "{{ $('Cleaning the data').item.json.output.form_source }}" },
    { "id": "nSz8IYntrtZMWSLGXsJz", "value": "{{ $('Cleaning the data').item.json.output.financial_data.monthly_payment }}" },
    { "id": "sF1LTSKFAmrtVumgIqnW", "value": "{{ $('Cleaning the data').item.json.output.co_applicant_info.phone }}" },
    { "id": "sdpCz3pmH2fxiGfhw9uW", "value": "{{ $('Cleaning the data').item.json.output.co_applicant_info.name }}" },
    { "id": "yrO31qSuF3okhisefIiH", "value": "{{ $('Cleaning the data').item.json.output.financial_data.amortization_years }}" },
    { "id": "OX3yG43LU86oTQu74X1g", "value": "{{ $json.webViewLink || "" }}" },
    { "id": "fd07p18IHGPiAwa7UaiM", "value": "{{ $('Cleaning the data').item.json.output.co_applicant_info.dob === "N/A" ? "" : $('Cleaning the data').item.json.output.co_applicant_info.dob }}" },
    { "id": "a9DRVKdz2ACUJtQNVu6b", "value": "New-Ready for Outreach" },
    { "id": "lR7oQKZ1Xez8Jb3kW7Jw", "value": "{{ $now.toFormat('yyyy-MM-dd') }}" }
  ]
}

parameters.text:
=You are a Scheduling Specialist analyzing a phone call transcript.

TRANSCRIPT:
{{ $json.transcript }}
{{ $json.applicant_phone }}
{{ $json.applicant_email }}
CURRENT DATE: Monday, March 16, 2026
CURRENT TIME ZONE REFERENCE: Use the timezone mentioned in the transcript.

### YOUR TASK:
Extract appointment details from the transcript above.

### STRICT RULES:
1. If the customer agreed to a meeting, set booking_confirmed to true
2. Convert relative dates to exact ISO 8601 format (e.g., "Wednesday at 11 AM Newark time" = "2026-03-18T11:00:00-05:00")
3. Extract the customer name exactly as spoken
4. Extract the call_id from the transcript context
5. If any field is unknown, use null
6. Return ONLY raw JSON — no markdown, no backticks, no explanation, no preamble

### RETURN THIS EXACT JSON  EXAMPLE STRUCTURE:
{
  "booking_confirmed": true,
  "appointment_iso": "2026-03-18T11:00:00-05:00",
  "appointment_day": "Wednesday",
  "appointment_time": "11:00 AM",
  "appointment_timezone": "America/New_York",
  "meeting_notes": "Review life and disability insurance options for mortgage protection",
  "customer_name": "EPI",
  "customer_phone": null,
  "call_id": "019cf5bd-641c-7000-addf-8bc132889fd4"
  "agent_name": "Jessy"
  "email": "arifulislamtanvir56@gmail.com"
}

parameters.subject: ✅ Your BMI Insurance Appointment is Confirmed
parameters.message:
=Hi {{ $json.client_name }},

Thank you for speaking with us today!

Here are your appointment details:

Day: {{ $json.appointment_day }}
Time: {{ $json.appointment_time }} (Los Angeles Time)
Duration: 45 Minutes
Agent: {{ $json.agent_name }}
Purpose: Life, Disability & Critical Illness Insurance Review
Referred by: {{ $json.mortgage_office }}

Please click the link below to confirm your appointment:

{{ $json.booking_url }}

This link is personal and can only be used once. Please do not share it.

If you need to reschedule, simply reply to this email.

Looking forward to speaking with you!

Warm regards,
{{ $json.agent_name }}
BMI Advisory Services
Phone: +1-604-761-1552
